message:
feat(ftui): rich detail/preview pane with tabs, markdown, find-in-detail (2noh9.3.5)

Replace placeholder detail pane with full rendering:
- Messages tab: role-colored headers (User/Agent/Tool/System) with markdown
  auto-detection via ftui_extras::markdown::MarkdownRenderer
- Snippets tab: per-message snippet display from cached ConversationView
- Raw tab: pretty-printed JSON of conversation metadata and messages
- Find-in-detail: highlight matches with yellow/orange, n/N navigation
- Scrolling with position indicator (line/total/pct)
- Word wrap toggle (DetailWrapToggled)
- Tab switching resets scroll position
- 14 new tests covering all detail pane features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
